ogTitle: Tuross Head vs Turramurra: Climate Safety

heading: Tuross Head vs Turramurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tuross Head, New South Wales and Turramurra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tuross Head has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Turramurra (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tuross Head or Turramurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tuross Head has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Turramurra scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tuross Head scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Turramurra scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tuross Head or Turramurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tuross Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
